texto: If your faith is strong enough, she'll be healed.' If I've heard that once, I've heard it a thousand times. The problem is, when someone tells you that, they're not asking you to put faith in the power of God; they're asking you to put faith in the power of your own faith. And I can't even pretend that my mustard-seed faith measures up to the promises of God.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Christy Wilson Beam sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “If your faith is strong enough, she'll be healed.' If I've heard that once, I've heard it a thous…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a fe, faith, healing, útil em momentos de termino e healing.

And I can't even pretend that my mustard-seed faith measures up to the promises of God.

texto: Heavenly Father,' Kevin says, 'we thank you for this beautiful day. For these beautiful children. For this food we're about to eat. Bless it to our bodies. Let it strengthen us to do your will and be your light in the world. Amen.
explicacao: Citação de Christy Wilson Beam sobre temas ligados a familia. “Heavenly Father,' Kevin says, 'we thank you for this beautiful day. For these beautiful children.…” articula familia, grace, prayer em registro de familia, com relevância para contextos como prayer.
